title: Ruby documentation  |  Google Cloud
content:
# Ruby documentation

[Read product documentation](https://cloud.google.com/ruby/docs/setup)

## Documentation resources

Find quickstarts and guides, review key references, and get help with common issues.

## Related resources

 Training and tutorials

 Use cases

 Code samples

Explore self-paced training from Google Cloud Skills Boost, use cases, reference architectures, and code samples with examples of how to use and connect Google Cloud services.

## Related videos

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/tzFfdtb33K4/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tzFfdtb33K4)

YouTube

[### What is Google Cloud SDK?](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tzFfdtb33K4)

Google Cloud SDK → https://goo.gle/3KyXpbc The Google Cloud Software Development Kit (SDK) is a collection of tools used to interact with Google Cloud APIs and manage the resources in your Google Cloud projects. These tools help developers and

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/BooQM4bMni8/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BooQM4bMni8)

YouTube

[### Building a WorldWeb App with Ruby, App Engine, Serverless Container, and Spanner (Cloud Next '19)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BooQM4bMni8)

In a world filled with security breaches making the front page of newspapers, how do you balance the velocity gains of serverless without compromising application security? In this talk, we'll discuss common serverless threat models, as well as how

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/d7bXH_2X760/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d7bXH_2X760)

YouTube

[### Cloud Shell](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d7bXH_2X760)

This video walks you through how to set up and use Cloud Shell. Cloud Shell Features: ● Full Power Access From Anywhere - Manage your GCP resources with the flexibility of a Linux shell. Cloud Shell provides command-line access to a virtual machine

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/t1KUlX4RwUg/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t1KUlX4RwUg)

YouTube

[### Using Cloud Natural Language From Ruby](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t1KUlX4RwUg)

Aja Hammerly (@the\_thagomizer) shows you how to use the NLP library from Ruby. This library does sentiment and syntax analysis on text in several languages. In addition this library can do entity analysis on text. More information about the Natural

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/m7AtOAbQ8Ug/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m7AtOAbQ8Ug)

YouTube

[### Running Rails Migrations with App Engine](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m7AtOAbQ8Ug)

Aja Hammerly (@the\_thagomizer) shows you how to run rails migrations when you deploy your app with App Engine flexible environment. This video uses CloudSQL 2nd generation. More information on running Rails on App Engine is available here:

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/hYiPlwtyZkg/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hYiPlwtyZkg)

YouTube

[### Google Cloud Platform loves Ruby (Google Cloud Next '17)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hYiPlwtyZkg)

Ruby developers welcome! Our dedicated Google Cloud Platform (GCP) Ruby team has built a great experience for Ruby developers using GCP. In this video, Remi Taylor walks through the steps to deploy, debug and scale a Ruby on Rails application on

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/QZzlfn3lsDg/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QZzlfn3lsDg)

YouTube

[### Ruby with Aja Hammerly: GCPPodcast 53](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QZzlfn3lsDg)

Original post: https://www.gcppodcast.com/post/episode-53-ruby-with-aja-hammerly/ Today Aja Hammerly, Developer Advocate and fellow teammate at Google Cloud Platform, joins your cohosts Francesc and Mark to tell us about all the cool things you can

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/09-OlnQ6fGs/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=09-OlnQ6fGs)

YouTube

[### Create a VM with Fog & Ruby](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=09-OlnQ6fGs)

Aja Hammerly (@the\_thagomizer) shows you how to use the fog library for ruby to create a VM on Google Compute Engine. The fog library provides a common interface for using many different cloud providers. More information: Fog:

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/lhWE6GTphXM/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lhWE6GTphXM)

YouTube

[### Upload to Google Cloud Storage with Fog](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lhWE6GTphXM)

Aja Hammerly (@the\_thagomizer) shows you how to use the fog library for ruby to upload a file to Google Cloud Storage. The fog library provides a common interface for using many different cloud providers. More information: Fog:

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/Mr1bFFugRYo/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mr1bFFugRYo)

YouTube

[### Create a BigQuery table with Ruby](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mr1bFFugRYo)

In this video Aja (@the\_thagomizer) shows you how to create a BigQuery table using the Google Cloud ruby gem. This video assumes you have a service account with BigQuery create permissions and that the BigQuery API is turned on. To learn more about

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/HI3mYjE1W3Y/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HI3mYjE1W3Y)

YouTube

[### Upload Files with Ruby](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HI3mYjE1W3Y)

In this video, Aja (@the\_thagomizer) shows you how to upload files to Google Cloud Storage using the Google Cloud ruby gem. This video assumes you have a service account with Storage create permissions and that the Cloud Storage API is turned on. To

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/tuGKy4OgXng/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tuGKy4OgXng)

YouTube

[### Using Ruby on Google Cloud Platform](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tuGKy4OgXng)

Google Cloud Platform has many tools for folks using Ruby. This video talks about running Ruby on Google App Engine and also talks about the gcloud gem. More information on running Ruby on Google Cloud Platform is available here:

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/olPk_uHgRyw/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=olPk_uHgRyw)

YouTube

[### Uploading a Photo to Cloud Storage from Rails](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=olPk_uHgRyw)

Sara Robinson (@SRobTweets) demonstrates how to upload a photo to Google Cloud Storage from a Rails app using the gcloud and carrierwave gems. To create a Cloud Storage bucket in the developer console, check out this Cloud Minute video:

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/9qcyTnWYFcw/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9qcyTnWYFcw)

YouTube

[### Testing a Web Server with Cloud Shell](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9qcyTnWYFcw)

Sandeep Dinesh (@sandeepdinesh) shows you how to test a Web Server running in Google Cloud Shell. Cloud Shell is an awesome tool that comes preconfigured with many development tools for you to use, such as gcloud, docker, python, java, node.js, php,
